verses.1: Hear the word that the LORD speaks to you, O house of Israel.
verses.2: This is what the LORD says:
verses.11: Thus you are to tell them: “These gods, who have made neither the heavens nor the earth, will perish from this earth and from under these heavens.”
verses.17: Gather up your belongings from this land, you who live under siege.
verses.18: For this is what the LORD says:
